title: Context Compaction — Interrupt + Context Usage UI

steps.title: SessionDO interrupt() method correct
steps.evidence: @callable interrupt() guards status=running, sends {type:'interrupt', session_id} via sendToGateway()

steps.title: SessionDO getContextUsage() method correct
steps.evidence: @callable getContextUsage() guards !vpsWs, sends {type:'get-context-usage', session_id} via sendToGateway()

steps.title: Hook wiring — interrupt, getContextUsage, context_usage event
steps.evidence: interrupt/getContextUsage callbacks wired via connection.call(). context_usage event parsed to ContextUsage state with totalTokens, maxTokens, percentage, model, autoCompact fields.

steps.title: UI — Interrupt button renders in header
steps.evidence: Button variant=secondary, aria-label='Interrupt session', guarded by canStop && onInterrupt. Verified via code review (no live DO backend available).

steps.title: UI — Context usage bar renders with color thresholds
steps.evidence: Progress bar: green<70%, yellow 70-90%, red>=90%. Width capped at 100%. Tooltip shows token counts. Percentage text rendered. Verified via code review.
